title: Secure The Broken Skyhook — Wing I
arc: Act I: The Aerie Reopened
unlock_requirement: Unlocks only after main Quest 250 completion and defeat of the final Astral Sovereign-class postgame gate condition.
story_purpose: Rebuild the sky wardens headquarters after the final boss collapse; this quest advances Sky Warden authority without creating or instantiating Torinn Rhogar as an NPC asset.
subquests: 1. Receive the sealed order from Torinn Rhogar and verify the postgame unlock seal against the Astral Sovereign defeat record. | 2. Inspect the The Aerie of Oaths, mark hazards, and log any skyship, ward, or anomaly damage on the Sky Warden operations slate. | 3. Coordinate with the Aetherhook Guard, then clear the required route without allowing civilian or ship systems to fail. | 4. Recover the primary objective item, proof fragment, survivor, Silverwing Corvette component, or oath record before the stormfront timer expires. | 5. Survive the investigation escalation, environmental hazard, or boarding-wave counterattack using level-40 postgame combat rules.
